Correct: The point I am trying to make is that advanced grammar becomes useful only when learners

entries.title: What should be emphasized is...

entries.content:
Rule: Cleft formulalar fikrning muhim qismini ajratadi va javobni aniqroq, kuchliroq va academic 
qiladi.

Wrong: reduced clause subjecti asosiy gap subjectiga mos kelmaydi yoki kerakli preposition tushib 
qoladi.
Correct: Having analysed the feedback, the students revised their essays more effectively.
Upgrade: Simple: Students used feedback and improved. Pro: Having used the feedback carefully, →
students improved their performance.

entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Nominalisation fe'l gaplarini otli akademik konstruktsiyaga aylantiradi. Bu writingni formal va 
compact qiladi.
Structure: The use of + noun + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.

Correct: The use of digital tools has changed the way students access information.
Upgrade: Simple: Students use digital tools. Pro: The use of digital tools has transformed the →
learning process.

kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: The tendency to translate directly can make learners' English sound unnatural.
Tarjima: So'zma-so'z tarjima qilishga moyillik o'rganuvchilarning inglizchasini notabiiy eshittirishi 
mumkin.
Wrong: nominal phrase ichida 'of/to/in' kabi bog'lovchi preposition tushib qoladi.
Correct: The tendency to translate directly can make learners' English sound unnatural.
Upgrade: Simple: Students use digital tools. Pro: The use of digital tools has transformed the →
learning process.

entries.title: The possibility of...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Nominalisation fe'l gaplarini otli akademik konstruktsiyaga aylantiradi. Bu writingni formal va 
compact qiladi.
Structure: The possibility of + noun/gerund + should be considered
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: The possibility of misunderstanding the question should be considered before giving a final 
answer.
Tarjima: Yakuniy javob berishdan oldin savolni noto'g'ri tushunish ehtimoli hisobga olinishi kerak.
Wrong: nominal phrase ichida 'of/to/in' kabi bog'lovchi preposition tushib qoladi.
Correct: The possibility of misunderstanding the question should be considered before giving a final 
answer.
Upgrade: Simple: Students use digital tools. Pro: The use of digital tools has transformed the →
learning process.

entries.title: If it were not for...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: If it were not for + noun phrase, subject + would + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: If it were not for regular feedback, many learners would keep repeating the same mistakes.
Tarjima: Muntazam fikr-mulohaza bo'lmaganida, ko'plab o'rganuvchilar bir xil xatolarni 
takrorlayvergan bo'lardi.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: If it were not for regular feedback, many learners would keep repeating the same mistakes.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Had it not been for...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Had it not been for + noun phrase, subject + would have + V3
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Had it not been for the teacher's guidance, the students would have misunderstood the task.
Tarjima: O'qituvchining yo'l-yo'rig'i bo'lmaganida, o'quvchilar vazifani noto'g'ri tushungan bo'lardi.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Had it not been for the teacher's guidance, the students would have misunderstood the task.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Were it not for...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Were it not for + noun phrase, subject + would + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Were it not for clear goals, learners would quickly lose direction.
Tarjima: Aniq maqsadlar bo'lmaganida, o'rganuvchilar tezda yo'nalishni yo'qotgan bo'lardi.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Were it not for clear goals, learners would quickly lose direction.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: But for...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: But for + noun phrase, subject + would/would have + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: But for consistent practice, most learners would not reach advanced fluency.
Tarjima: Muntazam mashq bo'lmaganida, ko'pchilik o'rganuvchilar yuqori darajadagi ravonlikka 
erisha olmas edi.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: But for consistent practice, most learners would not reach advanced fluency.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: If + subject + were to + verb...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: If + subject + were to + base verb, subject + would/could + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: If schools were to prioritise speaking practice, students would become more confident 
communicators.
Tarjima: Maktablar speaking mashqlariga ustuvorlik bersa, o'quvchilar ancha ishonchli 
muloqotchilarga aylangan bo'lardi.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: If schools were to prioritise speaking practice, students would become more confident 
communicators.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Should + subject + verb...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Should + subject + base verb, subject + will/can/would + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Should learners need clarification, they should ask before completing the task.
Tarjima: O'rganuvchilarga tushuntirish kerak bo'lsa, vazifani tugatishdan oldin so'rashi kerak.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Should learners need clarification, they should ask before completing the task.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: In the event that...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: In the event that + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: In the event that students miss a lesson, they should review the recorded materials.
Tarjima: O'quvchilar darsni o'tkazib yuborgan taqdirda, yozib olingan materiallarni ko'rib chiqishi 
kerak.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: In the event that students miss a lesson, they should review the recorded materials.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Unless + clause...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Unless + subject + verb, subject + will/can + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Unless learners use new structures actively, they will not become part of natural speech.
Tarjima: O'rganuvchilar yangi strukturalarni faol ishlatmasa, ular tabiiy nutqning bir qismiga 
aylanmaydi.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Unless learners use new structures actively, they will not become part of natural speech.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Provided that...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Provided that + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Provided that feedback is specific, it can help students correct their weaknesses quickly.
Tarjima: Fikr-mulohaza aniq bo'lsa, u o'quvchilarga kamchiliklarini tez tuzatishga yordam beradi.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Provided that feedback is specific, it can help students correct their weaknesses quickly.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Assuming that...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Assuming that + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Assuming that students practise daily, noticeable progress can be expected within a few 
months.
Tarjima: O'quvchilar har kuni mashq qiladi deb olsak, bir necha oy ichida sezilarli rivojlanishni kutish 
mumkin.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Assuming that students practise daily, noticeable progress can be expected within a few 
months.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Even if...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Even if + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Even if students know many words, they may struggle to speak clearly without sentence 
control.
Tarjima: O'quvchilar ko'p so'z bilsa ham, gap tuzishni nazorat qila olmasa, aniq gapirishda qiynalishi 
mumkin.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Even if students know many words, they may struggle to speak clearly without sentence 
control.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: Whether or not...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Bu formulalar taxmin, ehtimoliy vaziyat va alternativ natijalarni rasmiy va kuchli ifodalashga 
yordam beradi.
Structure: Whether or not + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Whether or not learners enjoy grammar, they still need it to express complex ideas 
accurately.
Tarjima: O'rganuvchilar grammatikani yoqtiradimi-yo'qmi, murakkab fikrlarni aniq ifodalash uchun 
baribir unga muhtoj.
Wrong: conditional patternlar aralashtiriladi yoki would/should noto'g'ri joylashadi.
Correct: Whether or not learners enjoy grammar, they still need it to express complex ideas 
accurately.
Upgrade: Simple: Feedback helps learners improve. Pro: Were it not for regular feedback, learners →
would repeat the same mistakes.

entries.title: While it may be true that...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: While it may be true that + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: While it may be true that online learning is convenient, it cannot fully replace face-to-face 
interaction.
Tarjima: Onlayn ta'lim qulay ekani rost bo'lishi mumkin, ammo u yuzma-yuz muloqotni to'liq 
almashtira olmaydi.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: While it may be true that online learning is convenient, it cannot fully replace face-to-face 
interaction.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Although there is some truth in...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Although there is some truth in + noun/gerund, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Although there is some truth in the idea that exams motivate students, they can also create 
unnecessary pressure.
Tarjima: Imtihonlar o'quvchilarni motivatsiya qiladi degan fikrda ma'lum haqiqat bor, ammo ular 
keraksiz bosim ham yaratishi mumkin.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Although there is some truth in the idea that exams motivate students, they can also create 
unnecessary pressure.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Despite the fact that...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Despite the fact that + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Despite the fact that grammar is challenging, it is essential for clear academic expression.
Tarjima: Grammatika qiyin bo'lishiga qaramay, u aniq akademik ifoda uchun zarur.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Despite the fact that grammar is challenging, it is essential for clear academic expression.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Regardless of whether...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Regardless of whether + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Regardless of whether students prefer speaking or writing, sentence control remains 
essential.
Tarjima: O'quvchilar speakingni yoki writingni afzal ko'rishidan qat'i nazar, gap tuzishni nazorat 
qilish muhim bo'lib qoladi.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Regardless of whether students prefer speaking or writing, sentence control remains 
essential.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: No matter how + adjective...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: No matter how + adjective + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: No matter how advanced a word is, it becomes useless if learners cannot use it naturally.
Tarjima: So'z qanchalik kuchli bo'lmasin, o'rganuvchi uni tabiiy ishlata olmasa, u foydasiz bo'lib 
qoladi.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: No matter how advanced a word is, it becomes useless if learners cannot use it naturally.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Admittedly, ... However, ...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Admittedly, + clause. However, + clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Admittedly, memorisation can help beginners. However, advanced learners need deeper 
sentence control.
Tarjima: Tan olish kerak, yodlash boshlang'ichlar uchun foydali bo'lishi mumkin. Biroq yuqori 
darajadagi o'rganuvchilar chuqurroq gap tuzish nazoratiga muhtoj.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Admittedly, memorisation can help beginners. However, advanced learners need deeper 
sentence control.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Much as + clause...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Much as + subject + verb, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Much as technology supports learning, it cannot replace a skilled teacher's guidance.
Tarjima: Texnologiya ta'limni qanchalik qo'llab-quvvatlamasin, u malakali o'qituvchining yo'l-
yo'rig'ini almashtira olmaydi.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Much as technology supports learning, it cannot replace a skilled teacher's guidance.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Even though...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Even though + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Even though advanced grammar seems difficult at first, it becomes easier with repeated use.
Tarjima: Kuchli grammatika boshida qiyin ko'rinsa ham, takroriy ishlatish bilan osonlashadi.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Even though advanced grammar seems difficult at first, it becomes easier with repeated use.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: That said, ...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: That said, + clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Digital tools are useful. That said, students still need guidance to use them effectively.
Tarjima: Raqamli vositalar foydali. Shunga qaramay, o'quvchilar ulardan samarali foydalanish uchun 
yo'l-yo'riqqa muhtoj.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Digital tools are useful. That said, students still need guidance to use them effectively.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Notwithstanding + noun phrase...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Notwithstanding + noun phrase, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Notwithstanding its benefits, online learning may reduce spontaneous classroom 
interaction.
Tarjima: Afzalliklariga qaramay, onlayn ta'lim sinfdagi tabiiy muloqotni kamaytirishi mumkin.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Notwithstanding its benefits, online learning may reduce spontaneous classroom interaction.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: For all its benefits, ...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: For all its benefits, + noun + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: For all its benefits, artificial intelligence cannot replace human judgement in education.
Tarjima: Ko'p foydalariga qaramay, sun'iy intellekt ta'limda insoniy mulohazani almashtira olmaydi.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: For all its benefits, artificial intelligence cannot replace human judgement in education.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: Whereas...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Balanced argument uchun qarama-qarshi fikrni tan olish, cheklash va o'z fikriga o'tish 
formulalari.
Structure: Whereas + clause, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Whereas memorisation helps with recognition, active practice helps with real 
communication.
Tarjima: Yodlash tanib olishga yordam bersa, faol mashq haqiqiy muloqotga yordam beradi.
Wrong: bitta clause ichida ikki xil contrast marker ishlatiladi yoki vergul noto'g'ri qo'yiladi.
Correct: Whereas memorisation helps with recognition, active practice helps with real 
communication.
Upgrade: Simple: Online learning is useful, but teachers are important. Pro: While online learning →
is useful, it cannot fully replace teacher guidance.

entries.title: This can be attributed to...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: This can be attributed to + noun/gerund
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to regular speaking practice and detailed 
feedback.
Tarjima: Ravonlikdagi yaxshilanishni muntazam speaking mashqi va batafsil feedback bilan izohlash 
mumkin.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to regular speaking practice and detailed 
feedback.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: This stems from...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: This stems from + noun/gerund
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Many speaking problems stem from a lack of sentence-building practice.
Tarjima: Ko'plab speaking muammolari gap tuzish mashqi yetishmasligidan kelib chiqadi.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: Many speaking problems stem from a lack of sentence-building practice.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: This gives rise to...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: This gives rise to + noun phrase
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Poor feedback can give rise to repeated mistakes and low confidence.
Tarjima: Sifatsiz feedback takroriy xatolar va past ishonchni keltirib chiqarishi mumkin.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: Poor feedback can give rise to repeated mistakes and low confidence.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: This leads to...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: This leads to + noun/gerund
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: A lack of practice leads to hesitation in real conversations.
Tarjima: Mashq yetishmasligi haqiqiy suhbatlarda ikkilanishga olib keladi.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: A lack of practice leads to hesitation in real conversations.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: This results in...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: This results in + noun/gerund
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Weak sentence control results in unclear answers, even when students know many words.
Tarjima: Gap tuzish nazoratining zaifligi, o'quvchilar ko'p so'z bilsa ham, noaniq javoblarga olib 
keladi.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: Weak sentence control results in unclear answers, even when students know many words.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: As a result of...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: As a result of + noun/gerund, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: As a result of consistent revision, students became more confident using complex structures.
Tarjima: Muntazam takrorlash natijasida o'quvchilar murakkab strukturalardan foydalanishda 
ishonchliroq bo'ldi.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: As a result of consistent revision, students became more confident using complex structures.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: The extent to which...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: The extent to which + clause + depends on...
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: The extent to which grammar improves speaking depends on how actively it is practised.
Tarjima: Grammatikaning speakingni qanchalik yaxshilashi uning qanchalik faol mashq qilinishiga 
bog'liq.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: The extent to which grammar improves speaking depends on how actively it is practised.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: There is a tendency for...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: There is a tendency for + noun + to + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: There is a tendency for learners to avoid difficult structures instead of practising them.
Tarjima: O'rganuvchilarda qiyin strukturalarni mashq qilish o'rniga ulardan qochish moyilligi bor.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: There is a tendency for learners to avoid difficult structures instead of practising them.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: It is increasingly common for...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: It is increasingly common for + noun + to + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: It is increasingly common for students to use AI tools when preparing for language exams.
Tarjima: Til imtihonlariga tayyorlanishda o'quvchilarning AI vositalaridan foydalanishi tobora keng 
tarqalmoqda.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: It is increasingly common for students to use AI tools when preparing for language exams.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: It remains unclear whether...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: It remains unclear whether + clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: It remains unclear whether fully online learning can produce the same speaking confidence 
as face-to-face practice.
Tarjima: To'liq onlayn ta'lim yuzma-yuz mashqdek speaking ishonchini bera oladimi, bu hali aniq 
emas.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: It remains unclear whether fully online learning can produce the same speaking confidence 
as face-to-face practice.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: It is worth considering whether...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: It is worth considering whether + clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: It is worth considering whether students need fewer rules and more guided practice.
Tarjima: O'quvchilarga kamroq qoida va ko'proq yo'naltirilgan mashq kerakmi, buni o'ylab ko'rishga 
arziydi.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: It is worth considering whether students need fewer rules and more guided practice.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: One possible explanation is that...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: One possible explanation is that + clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: One possible explanation is that learners focus too much on rules and not enough on real 
usage.
Tarjima: Ehtimoliy izohlardan biri shuki, o'rganuvchilar qoidalarga haddan tashqari ko'p, real 
ishlatishga esa yetarlicha e'tibor bermaydi.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: One possible explanation is that learners focus too much on rules and not enough on real 
usage.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: This raises the question of...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: This raises the question of + noun/gerund
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: This raises the question of how grammar should be taught to make it useful in 
communication.
Tarjima: Bu grammatikani muloqotda foydali bo'lishi uchun qanday o'rgatish kerak degan savolni 
tug'diradi.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: This raises the question of how grammar should be taught to make it useful in 
communication.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: It would be misleading to claim that...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Sabab, oqibat, trend, ehtiyotkor xulosa va akademik transitionlarni kuchliroq ifodalash 
formulalari.
Structure: It would be misleading to claim that + clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: It would be misleading to claim that advanced grammar is only useful for writing.
Tarjima: Kuchli grammatika faqat writing uchun foydali deyish noto'g'ri tasavvur berishi mumkin.
Wrong: academic phrase noto'g'ri preposition bilan ishlatiladi yoki noun phrase to'liq emas.
Correct: It would be misleading to claim that advanced grammar is only useful for writing.
Upgrade: Simple: Practice improves fluency. Pro: The improvement in fluency can be attributed to →
regular practice.

entries.title: far more likely to...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: subject + be + far more likely to + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Students who receive specific feedback are far more likely to correct their mistakes 
permanently.
Tarjima: Aniq feedback olgan o'quvchilar xatolarini doimiy tuzatish ehtimoli ancha yuqori.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: Students who receive specific feedback are far more likely to correct their mistakes 
permanently.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: considerably less likely to...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: subject + be + considerably less likely to + verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Learners without regular speaking practice are considerably less likely to develop natural 
fluency.
Tarjima: Muntazam speaking mashqi bo'lmagan o'rganuvchilarning tabiiy ravonlikni rivojlantirish 
ehtimoli ancha past.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: Learners without regular speaking practice are considerably less likely to develop natural 
fluency.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: not so much A as B
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: not so much + A + as + B
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Advanced grammar is not so much about memorising rules as about controlling meaning 
precisely.
Tarjima: Kuchli grammatika qoidalarni yodlashdan ko'ra, ma'noni aniq boshqarish haqida.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: Advanced grammar is not so much about memorising rules as about controlling meaning 
precisely.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: as much about A as it is about B
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: subject + be + as much about + A + as it is about + B
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Good speaking is as much about organising ideas as it is about using accurate grammar.
Tarjima: Yaxshi speaking aniq grammatikadan foydalanish qanchalik muhim bo'lsa, fikrlarni 
tartiblash ham shunchalik muhimdir.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: Good speaking is as much about organising ideas as it is about using accurate grammar.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: The more..., the more...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: The more + clause, the more + clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: The more learners practise complex sentences, the more naturally they use them in 
speaking.
Tarjima: O'rganuvchilar murakkab gaplarni qancha ko'p mashq qilsa, ularni speakingda shuncha 
tabiiy ishlatadi.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: The more learners practise complex sentences, the more naturally they use them in speaking.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: rather than...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: clause + rather than + noun/gerund/base verb
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Learners should practise using structures in answers rather than memorising them in 
isolation.
Tarjima: O'rganuvchilar strukturalarni alohida yodlash o'rniga ularni javoblarda ishlatishni mashq 
qilishi kerak.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: Learners should practise using structures in answers rather than memorising them in 
isolation.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: instead of...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: Instead of + noun/gerund, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: Instead of learning rules passively, students should build sentences with them.
Tarjima: Qoidalarni passiv o'rganish o'rniga, o'quvchilar ular bilan gaplar tuzishi kerak.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: Instead of learning rules passively, students should build sentences with them.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: in comparison with...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: In comparison with + noun phrase, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: In comparison with basic grammar, advanced structures allow learners to express more 
nuanced ideas.
Tarjima: Oddiy grammatika bilan solishtirganda, kuchli strukturalar o'rganuvchilarga nozikroq 
fikrlarni ifodalash imkonini beradi.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: In comparison with basic grammar, advanced structures allow learners to express more 
nuanced ideas.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: to a greater/lesser extent...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: To a greater/lesser extent, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: To a greater extent, success in speaking depends on confidence and sentence control.
Tarjima: Kengroq ma'noda, speakingdagi muvaffaqiyat ishonch va gap tuzish nazoratiga bog'liq.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: To a greater extent, success in speaking depends on confidence and sentence control.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: to some extent...
entries.source: Advanced Grammar and Sentence Formula Workbook
entries.content:
Rule: Taqqoslash, ehtimollik, nozik farq va ehtiyotkor akademik fikr bildirish formulalari.
Structure: To some extent, clause
Use: IELTS Speaking/Writing, academic paragraph, discussion va advanced answerlarda fikrni 
kuchliroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Example: To some extent, grammar knowledge helps; however, learners also need repeated real 
practice.
Tarjima: Ma'lum darajada grammatika bilimi yordam beradi; biroq o'rganuvchilarga takroriy real 
mashq ham kerak.
Wrong: comparison structureda 'to', 'than', 'as' yoki word order noto'g'ri ishlatiladi.
Correct: To some extent, grammar knowledge helps; however, learners also need repeated real 
practice.
Upgrade: Simple: Advanced grammar helps speaking. Pro: Advanced grammar is not so much →
about rules as about controlling meaning precisely.

entries.title: Perspective
entries.content:
Meaning (UZ): Nuqtayi nazar
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq, 
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: What matters most is + noun/that-clause
Collocations / Natural chunks: a key perspective; a important perspective; the role of perspective
Example 1: From a broader perspective, education is not just about exams but 
about building judgement and confidence.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Perspective' Nuqtayi nazar ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Example 2: This perspective helps learners see grammar as a tool for meaning 
rather than a list of rules.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Perspective' Nuqtayi nazar ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Weak use: Perspective is important.
Strong use: What matters most is how the idea of perspective helps the speaker 
explain technology with a clear reason and a real example.

entries.title: Aspect
entries.content:
Meaning (UZ): Jihat
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq, 
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: The role of + noun + in + context
Collocations / Natural chunks: an key aspect; an important aspect; the role of aspect
Example 1: The role of aspect in health becomes clear when small daily habits 
protect long-term wellbeing.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Aspect' Jihat ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning vazifasi - 
itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va mazmunli 
ko'rsatish.
Example 2: What matters most is not the word itself, but how naturally the idea of 
aspect is used in context.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Aspect' Jihat ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning vazifasi - 
itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va mazmunli 
ko'rsatish.
Weak use: Aspect is important.
Strong use: What matters most is how the idea of aspect helps the speaker explain 
health with a clear reason and a real example.

entries.title: Impact
entries.content:
Meaning (UZ): Ta'sir
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq, 
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: This can be attributed to + noun/gerund
Collocations / Natural chunks: an key impact; an important impact; the role of impact
Example 1: Technology has a measurable impact on how students access 
information and organise their learning.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Impact' Ta'sir ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning vazifasi - 
itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va mazmunli 
ko'rsatish.
Example 2: The long-term impact of daily habits is often greater than one short 
period of intense study.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Impact' Ta'sir ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning vazifasi - 
itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va mazmunli 
ko'rsatish.
Weak use: Impact is important.
Strong use: What matters most is how the idea of impact helps the speaker explain 
environment with a clear reason and a real example.

entries.title: Approach
entries.content:
Meaning (UZ): Yondashuv
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq, 
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: The extent to which + clause + depends on + noun
Collocations / Natural chunks: an key approach; an important approach; the role of approach
Example 1: A practical approach helps learners turn difficult grammar into usable 
speaking patterns.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Approach' Yondashuv ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Example 2: Instead of memorising isolated words, students need an approach that 
connects vocabulary with real answers.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Approach' Yondashuv ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Weak use: Approach is important.
Strong use: What matters most is how the idea of approach helps the speaker 
explain career with a clear reason and a real example.

entries.title: Factor
entries.content:
Meaning (UZ): Omil
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq,
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: It is not X but Y that + clause
Collocations / Natural chunks: a key factor; a important factor; the role of factor
Example 1: Consistency is a major factor in fluency because language improves 
through repeated use.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Factor' Omil ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning vazifasi - itemni 
real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va mazmunli 
ko'rsatish.
Example 2: One factor that many learners ignore is how much sleep affects 
concentration and memory.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Factor' Omil ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning vazifasi - itemni 
real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va mazmunli 
ko'rsatish.
Weak use: Factor is important.
Strong use: What matters most is how the idea of factor helps the speaker explain 
communication with a clear reason and a real example.

entries.title: Tendency
entries.content:
Meaning (UZ): Moyillik
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq, 
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: What matters most is + noun/that-clause
Collocations / Natural chunks: a key tendency; a important tendency; the role of tendency
Example 1: The role of tendency in leadership becomes clear when a good leader 
builds trust through responsibility and fairness.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Tendency' Moyillik ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning vazifasi - 
itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va mazmunli 
ko'rsatish.

Meaning (UZ): Bardoshlilik
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq, 
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: It is not X but Y that + clause
Collocations / Natural chunks: a key resilience; a important resilience; the role of resilience
Example 1: The role of resilience in education becomes clear when students learn 
with purpose rather than memorising blindly.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Resilience' Bardoshlilik ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Example 2: What matters most is not the word itself, but how naturally the idea of 
resilience is used in context.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Resilience' Bardoshlilik ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Weak use: Resilience is important.
Strong use: What matters most is how the idea of resilience helps the speaker 
explain education with a clear reason and a real example.

Meaning (UZ): Globallashuv
Use: Akademik yozuv, IELTS Writing va Speaking Part 3 da fikrni aniqroq, 
rasmiyroq ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: The role of + noun + in + context
Collocations / Natural chunks: a key globalization; a important globalization; the role of globalization
Example 1: The role of globalization in health becomes clear when small daily 
habits protect long-term wellbeing.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Globalization' Globallashuv ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Example 2: What matters most is not the word itself, but how naturally the idea of 
globalization is used in context.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'Globalization' Globallashuv ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Weak use: Globalization is important.
Strong use: What matters most is how the idea of globalization helps the speaker 
explain health with a clear reason and a real example.

Meaning (UZ): Manfaati uchun
Use: IELTS Speaking javobini tartibli, aniq va yuqori darajada qurish uchun 
ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: Pattern + complete answer + reason
Example 1: For the sake of children, schools should be safe.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'For the sake of' Manfaati uchun ma'nosida ishlatilgan. 
Gapning vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, 
to'liq va mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Example 2: This pattern helps the speaker move from a short idea to a complete 
answer about career.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'For the sake of' Manfaati uchun ma'nosida ishlatilgan. 
Gapning vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, 
to'liq va mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Weak use: For the sake of.
Strong use: For the sake of a good leader builds trust through responsibility and 
fairness.

entries.title: On behalf of
entries.content:
Meaning (UZ): Nomidan
Use: IELTS Speaking javobini tartibli, aniq va yuqori darajada qurish uchun 
ishlatiladi.
Formula Match: Formula + topic + example
Example 1: On behalf of my family, thank you for your support.
Example 1 (UZ): Bu misolda 'On behalf of' Nomidan ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Example 2: This pattern helps the speaker move from a short idea to a complete 
answer about communication.
Example 2 (UZ): Bu misolda 'On behalf of' Nomidan ma'nosida ishlatilgan. Gapning 
vazifasi - itemni real speaking yoki writing kontekstida tabiiy, to'liq va 
mazmunli ko'rsatish.
Weak use: On behalf of.
Strong use: On behalf of planning helps learners avoid unnecessary pressure.
